channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Swing voters factor high gas prices into their political decisions
item.description: As part of NPR's Swing Shift project, these swing voters are divided on who is responsible for high gas prices, but they all agree it is a key issue.

item.title: Trump proposes gas tax holiday, but a larger problem looms
item.description: Suspending the federal gas tax could save drivers up to 18.4 cents per gallon, but it would deplete the fund used for road construction and repairs.

item.title: Ohio pastor-turned-lawmaker supports Charlie Kirk American Heritage Act for schools
item.description: The bill would allow teaching the positive impact of Judeo-Christian values in U.S. history. Critics argue it presents a biased perspective.

item.title: Trick or spice? How the 'nutmeg' became a dominant soccer move
item.description: Nutmeg is a common holiday eggnog spice, but it is also one of the most desired trick moves in soccer.
